word: H7961 - שָׁלֵו - shâlêv - shaw-lave' - At ease

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁלוה שׁליו שׁלו

Transliteration: shâlêv shâlêyv shelêvâh

Phonetic: shaw-lave'

BDB Definition:

  1. quiet, at ease, prosperous
    1. at ease (of persons)
    2. quiet (of land)
    3. quiet, ease
    4. ease (substantive)

Origin: from H7951

TWOT entry: 2392c

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
